summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements. REQ-2, REQ-3, and REQ-4 are clearly addressed in the frontend changes. However, REQ-1 (backend guard in updateAvailability) is not visibly implemented in the diff — the backend/main.mo diff is truncated and shows no guard logic, and no new updateAvailability function with an accepted-trip check is evident in the shown content.

missing_requirements.requirement: In the backend, add a guard to the updateAvailability (or equivalent) function: if the calling driver has any trip with status accepted, reject any attempt to set availability to false (Unavailable) and return a descriptive error message such as 'Cannot set Unavailable while you have an accepted trip.'
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and shows only type definitions, map declarations, and helper functions — no updateAvailability function or guard logic checking for accepted trips before allowing availability to be set to false is visible in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Availability toggle lock also applied inside EditDriverProfileForm and EditDriverProfileModal (edit profile flow)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request scopes the availability toggle lock exclusively to the Driver Dashboard availability toggle area. The diff also propagates hasAcceptedTrip into EditDriverProfileForm and EditDriverProfileModal, locking availability in the edit profile form — this was not explicitly requested.
